nasb.text: The Lord said to me, “This gate shall be shut; it shall not be opened, and no one shall enter by it, for the Lord God of Israel has entered by it; therefore it shall be shut.

esv.text: And the Lord said to me, “This gate shall remain shut; it shall not be opened, and no one shall enter by it, for the Lord, the God of Israel, has entered by it. Therefore it shall remain shut.

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：“這門必須關閉，不可打開；任何人也不得從那裡進入；因為耶和華以色列的　神已經從那裡進入，所以這門必須關閉。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“这门必须关闭，不可打开。没有人能从这门进入，因为以色列的上帝耶和华已从这门进入，所以这门必须关闭。
